mapper.select: SELECT CO_ID, JB_ID, JB_STS, FILE_ID, FILE_NM, TOTAL_ROWS, JB_PROG, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT FROM COM_XPT_JB WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND JB_ID = #{jbId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT get_mdl_seq2(#{coId}, 'XPT', 6)
INSERT INTO COM_XPT_JB ( CO_ID, JB_ID, JB_STS, FILE_ID, FILE_NM, TOTAL_ROWS, JB_PROG, JB_RQST_PARA, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{jbId}, #{jbSts}, #{fileId}, #{fileNm}, #{totalRows}, #{jbProg}, #{jbRqstPara, typeHandler=com.clt.hrm.infra.common.typehandler.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{creUsrId}, NOW(), #{creUsrId}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE COM_XPT_JB SET JB_STS = #{jbSts},
FILE_ID = #{fileId},
ERR_MSG = #{errMsg},
UPD_DT = NOW(), UPD_USR_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND JB_ID = #{jbId}
